knowledge.insight: KVD: 'When I pinpoint a good school of big bass, I have to maximize the number from that school. Use a search bait to pinpoint them, determine if they're actively feeding and what lures to fish, then slow down my presentation to catch as many as possible before they quit biting or move. My top finesse baits: tube, shaky head, drop shot, Ned rig, wacky-rigged worm, and Neko rig.'
